settings.mode.label: Modded Mode
settings.mode.desc:
Auto: Only mark the game as modded when mods with affects_gameplay: true are loaded.
Always Vanilla: Never mark as modded even if gameplay mods are loaded (⚠ may corrupt saves).
Game Default: Use the game's default logic — any loaded mod marks the game as modded.

⚠ Restart the game for this change to take effect.
settings.patchModManager.label: Intercept IsRunningModded()
settings.patchModManager.desc:
On: All callers of IsRunningModded() (mod manager, multiplayer mod list, Sentry, etc.)
    are controlled by the current Modded Mode. Side effect: mod count and hash on the
    main menu may not display.
Off: Only the save path is controlled by the current Modded Mode; UI and multiplayer
    lists use the original behavior.

⚠ Restart the game for this change to take effect.
settings.verboseLogging.label: Verbose Logging
settings.verboseLogging.desc:
On: Additionally output Debug-level logs for troubleshooting.
Off: Only output Info / Warn / Error logs.

⚠ Only affects this mod. Takes effect immediately.
settings.resetDefaults.label: Reset to Defaults
settings.resetDefaults.desc:
Restore all settings to their default values.
⚠ Some changes require a restart to take effect.
log.patchModManagerEnabled: PatchModManagerIsRunningModded enabled, intercepting all IsRunningModded() calls
log.autoMode: Auto mode: {Known} mods detected, {Loaded} loaded (gameplay: {Gameplay}, non-gameplay: {NonGameplay})
log.defaultMode: Default mode: {Total} mods in ModManager, Loaded/Failed: {LoadedOrFailed}
log.autoFallback: RitsuLib returned 0 known mods, falling back to Default mode evaluation
